message:
test(search): add 14 property-based tests for chunking adapter roundtrip fidelity

New proptest suite validates SemanticChunk → ChunkDocument conversion:
- Round-trip field preservation (core, offsets, timestamps, event IDs, overlap)
- All metadata keys have ft. prefix
- Extraction helper consistency
- Conversion determinism
- Batch order/count preservation
- Batch stats accuracy
- Title extraction semantics (char vs byte boundary)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
